physics_verdicts.name: maximum_magnetic_field_of_poloidal_field_coil
physics_verdicts.reason: The quantity is the maximum magnetic field (T) on the PF coil conductor surface, and the name correctly preserves the maximum extremum and the poloidal-field-coil locus without misstating the observable or adding spurious qualifiers.

physics_verdicts.name: major_radius_of_primary_x_point
physics_verdicts.reason: The name correctly denotes the cylindrical R coordinate (major radius) of the primary X-point of the separatrix, preserving the locus qualifier with no spurious modifiers.

physics_verdicts.name: coolant_pressure_at_inlet
physics_verdicts.reason: The name correctly denotes a pressure (Pa) of the coolant medium at the inlet locus, preserving both the coolant medium and inlet locus qualifiers without adding unwarranted modifiers.

physics_verdicts.name: maximum_neutron_flux_at_first_wall
physics_verdicts.reason: The DD-authoritative unit W·m^-2 (power per area) denotes a neutron energy/power flux density, but the term 'neutron_flux' conventionally means a particle flux (m^-2·s^-1), so the base mis-states the physical quantity even though the maximum and first-wall locus qualifiers are correctly preserved.

physics_verdicts.name: major_radius_of_magnetic_axis
physics_verdicts.reason: The name correctly denotes the cylindrical R coordinate (major radius) of the magnetic axis as documented, with the appropriate locus qualifier preserved and no redundant modifiers.

physics_verdicts.name: plasma_current
physics_verdicts.reason: The name correctly denotes the total plasma current (Ip) in amperes; the toroidal direction is inherent to plasma current so omitting it avoids over-qualification while preserving the physical observable.

physics_verdicts.name: toroidal_electric_field
physics_verdicts.reason: The unit V/m and documentation confirm an electric field, and 'toroidal' is a meaningful directional component qualifier that is neither inherent nor redundant, so the name faithfully captures the toroidal component of the electric field.

physics_verdicts.name: electron_density
physics_verdicts.reason: The name correctly denotes electron number density (m^-3) with the species qualifier preserved, matching the documented total electron density without spurious modifiers.

physics_verdicts.name: plasma_current
physics_verdicts.reason: The quantity is the total plasma current in amperes; plasma current is inherently toroidal so omitting 'toroidal' avoids over-qualification, and the name correctly denotes the physical current observable rather than the instrument state.

physics_verdicts.name: current_of_rogowski_coil
physics_verdicts.reason: The documentation states this is the net current ENCLOSED within the Rogowski coil contour, but `current_of_rogowski_coil` mis-states the measurement principle by attributing the current to the coil itself rather than to the current threading the loop, and drops the load-bearing 'enclosed' qualifier.

physics_verdicts.name: maximum_magnetic_field_magnitude
physics_verdicts.reason: The source is specifically the maximum field on the poloidal field coil conductor surface, so dropping the locus qualifier (at_poloidal_field_coil) loses a load-bearing qualifier and broadens the quantity beyond what is measured.
